title: ferray-core: DynArray requires exhaustive match for every operation — needs macro or trait-object dispatch
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

DynArray in dynarray.rs requires a 15-arm match for every operation (shape, dtype, display, zeros, etc.). Adding a new dtype variant means touching every match. NumPy solves this with function pointers in PyArray_Descr (arrfuncs) — each dtype registers its own copy/compare/cast/fill functions. ferray could improve this with: (1) a macro_rules that generates match arms for all variants given a closure, (2) a DynArrayOps trait object that each Element type registers, or (3) a dispatch table similar to NumPy's arrfuncs. Issue #125 notes the boilerplate; this issue is about the architectural fix.
